title: Perform immunohaematological tests
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform immunohaematological tests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Process samples and associated request forms

pcs.text: Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record any discrepancies and indicate action required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record any discrepancies and indicate action required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record any discrepancies and indicate action required.

pcs.text: Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Process samples and associated request forms

elements.title: Perform tests

pcs.text: Conduct individual tests in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct individual tests in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct individual tests in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use appropriate manual techniques to determine patient/donor red cell phenotype and antibody status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate manual techniques to determine patient/donor red cell phenotype and antibody status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate manual techniques to determine patient/donor red cell phenotype and antibody status.

pcs.text: Read and grade tube and card agglutination reactions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and grade tube and card agglutination reactions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and grade tube and card agglutination reactions.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correctly interpret results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correctly interpret results.

pcs.text: Validate test results using control cells and reagents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Validate test results using control cells and reagents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Validate test results using control cells and reagents.

pcs.text: Complete documentation required to permit the issuing of blood or blood components that have been cleared for use by clinical staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete documentation required to permit the issuing of blood or blood components that have been cleared for use by clinical staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete documentation required to permit the issuing of blood or blood components that have been cleared for use by clinical staff.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform tests

elements.title: Maintain laboratory records

pcs.text: Record and/or check data in accordance with workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and/or check data in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.
